title: Coins!
description: Now the game will have coins that can be actively used for trading with friends or server players
body:
![coins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0e2ca7314ec5475fc6ea94f571d2e001b09db6d.png)
## [![F](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc75bca361a36bacf80e2cce8ee5f72065dbd1e0.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/coins-ll) ![dont fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc2930c1eddd42c9adeb54278e5df1e9ad1f9df9.png)![modloader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed21a408237eef6d25921ea3774563a91157f206.png)
# **About**
### **English**
Coins is a mod that adds a large number of different coins to the game, with which you can create a full-fledged economy. The fashion contains not only coins, but also stacks of coins, that will make it easier to pay for goods with a high price
### **Русский**
Простой мод добавляющий в игру большое количество различных монет, с помощью которых можно создать полноценную экономику. В моде присутствуют не только монеты, но еще и стопки монет, которые облегчат оплату товара с большой ценой
### **All content:**

# **FAQ**


```
Q: Will you update the mod to newer versions?
A: Yes, but everything has its time

Q: will you be making a port for Fabric? 
A: Maybe later

Q: Where can I see all the crafts from the mod? 
A: Just above are the crafts from the mod
```
